creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
There have been 5 releases since this port was last updated.
Additionally, it forces a dependency on libidn unnecessarily.

The attached patch updates to 2.8.8.p4, turns IDN support into an
OPTION, uses the options helpers to avoid unnecessary bsd.port.options.mk
inclusion, removes erroneous slashes from post-install, adds missing
%%PORTDOCS%% tags in the pkg-plist, dispenses with gratuitous symlink
creation, and simplifies the DISTNAME.
